# Waktu+ - Prayer Times Display

> Free full-screen prayer times display for mosques and suraus in Malaysia. JAKIM-accurate, bilingual, no ads, no signup.

## Overview

Waktu+ is a full-screen prayer times display designed for mosques and suraus in Malaysia. It provides accurate prayer times based on JAKIM (Jabatan Kemajuan Islam Malaysia) data, with large typography, azan alerts, and Iqamah countdowns suitable for TVs and monitors.

Website: https://waktu.shahrulestar.com

## Pages

### About (/about)
- Simple project overview for Waktu+ prayer times display

### Home (/)
- Full-screen prayer times display for mosques and suraus
- Prayer times with large typography
- Real-time clock synced to server time
- Countdown to the next prayer
- Azan alerts and Iqamah countdown
- Friday/Jumaah khutbah alerts
- Sunrise (Syuruk) countdown
- Customizable title, theme color, and settings
- Automatic zone detection via GPS

## Localization
- Bilingual: English and Bahasa Malaysia
- Localized prayer names, dates, and UI elements
- Islamic date display in Hijri calendar format

## Technical Stack
- Built with Next.js and React
- Progressive Web App (PWA) support
- Responsive design scaled from a 1920x1080 layout

## API Endpoints
- /api/prayer — Prayer times data from JAKIM (waktusolat.app)
- /api/time — Server time synchronization
- /api/locate — GPS-based prayer zone detection
